dashboard.title: Dashboard
monitoring.title: Hardware Monitoring
opt.title: Windows Optimization
opt.power.title: High performance power plan
opt.power.desc: Switches the active power plan to High performance. The previous plan is recorded and restored on undo.
opt.gamemode.title: Windows Game Mode
opt.gamemode.desc: Enables Windows Game Mode so the OS prioritizes the running game.
opt.background.title: Reduce background apps
opt.background.desc: Disables UWP background app access globally for the current user.
opt.scheduling.title: Gaming CPU scheduling
opt.scheduling.desc: Tunes Win32PrioritySeparation for short, variable quanta favoring foreground apps.
opt.latency.title: Latency improvements
opt.latency.desc: Raises multimedia responsiveness and removes network throttling for lower input latency.
opt.gpusched.title: Hardware GPU scheduling
opt.cpupriority.title: Game task priority
opt.cpupriority.desc: Raises the multimedia scheduler priority class for games.
ram.title: RAM Cleaner
ram.safety_note: Protected system processes (csrss, lsass, dwm, ...) are never touched. Trimmed pages reload transparently from the page file — no application is closed or crashed.
temp.title: Temp Cleaner
profiles.title: Gaming Profiles
profiles.failed: Some actions failed — check the logs.
profile.competitive.name: Competitive FPS
profile.competitive.desc: Lowest input latency for competitive shooters: high performance power, scheduling and latency tweaks.
profile.maxfps.name: Maximum FPS
profile.maxfps.desc: Every safe optimization enabled, including hardware GPU scheduling, for the highest frame rate.
profile.balanced.name: Balanced
profile.balanced.desc: Light touch: Game Mode and latency improvements only.
profile.streaming.name: Streaming
profile.streaming.desc: Keeps encoder headroom while gaming: performance power plan and foreground scheduling.
profile.lowend.name: Low-End PC
profile.lowend.desc: Frees resources on weak hardware by cutting background apps.
profile.laptop.name: Laptop
profile.laptop.desc: Battery-friendly: Game Mode and background reduction without forcing high power draw.
bench.title: Benchmark
bench.baseline_set: Baseline saved — run again after optimizing to compare.
recovery.title: Recovery
settings.title: Settings
settings.restore_point: Create a restore point before optimizations
logs.title: Logs
updates.title: Updates
